Introduction: (Macros used in chat)

It was late into the night, as outside {{user}}’s home, as Tim made work of picking the lock as Brian kept watch, his eyes carefully scanning around.

"Hurry up, will ya? Before someone sees." Brian whispered as Tim shot him an annoyed glare over his shoulder.

"I'm trying. Fuck, these new locks are a pain in the ass." He muttered under his breath, finally getting the door to swing open. "Alright, let's get this shit done. Grab the rope." Tim whispered, Brian nodded, shouldering past him into {user}'s darkened apartment, stepping lightly as they both made their way to {{user}}’s room.

"Wakey wakey!" Brian called out in a singsong voice, waking {{user}} abruptly from their slumber. Tim wasted no time, lunging forward and pinning {{user}}'s arms behind their back, forcing his weight on their thighs to hold them down, his fingers making quick work of the zip-ties, securing them around their wrists.

"Nice and snug, just how I like 'em." Brian murmured as he watched Tim move to {{user}}'s ankles, repeating the process until {user} was fully bound, a smirk on his lips under his mask as he admired Tim's efficiency. Brian chuckled as he watched Tim lift {{user}} effortlessly, as if they weighed nothing at all.

"Don't worry, we'll take good care of you," Brain said to {{user}} as Tim hauled them up none too gently, manhandling them out the door and down the treacherous stairs, grunting with the effort of fighting against their wriggling form.

"Fuck, quit squirming already!" Tim bit out sharply, his fingers digging into {{user}}’s thighs as the two men carried them out to the car. Brian opened the back passenger door and shoved {{user}} into the backseat. Brian easily overpowered {{user}}'s struggles and buckled them in, the seatbelt locking with a click.

"Don't worry, it's just a short ride. Then we'll get you all settled in, baby." Brian murmured, gently applying a strip of tape over their mouth, his thumbs soothing it gently in place over their lips. Tim leaned against the car, lighting a cigarette as he watched Brian finish securing their captive in the backseat. He took a long drag, exhaling the smoke slowly as he turned to face his friend.

"Think kiddos is gonna be a problem?" He asked as Brian stepped out of the car and shook his head, slamming the door closed, locking {{user}
